tool_calls.name: send_command_to_device_tool
tool_calls.arguments:
{"device_identifier":"FortiGate7.0.14-1","command":"config firewall address
edit "ATTACKER_203"
set subnet 203.0.113.1 255.255.255.255
next
end

config firewall policy
edit 0
set name "Block_Attacker_203"
set srcintf "any"
set dstintf "any"
set srcaddr "ATTACKER_203"
set dstaddr "all"
set action deny
set schedule "always"
set service "ALL"
set logtraffic all
next
end

show firewall policy | grep -n "Block_Attacker_203" -n -A 20 -B 4 || true"}

tool_calls.name: send_command_to_device_tool
tool_calls.arguments:
{"device_identifier":"FortiGate7.0.14-1","command":"config firewall address
edit "ATTACKER_203"
set subnet 203.0.113.1 255.255.255.255
next
end

config firewall policy
edit 0
set name "Block_Attacker_203"
set srcintf "any"
set dstintf "any"
set srcaddr "ATTACKER_203"
set dstaddr "all"
set action deny
set schedule "always"
set service "ALL"
set logtraffic all
next
end

get firewall policy | grep -n "Block_Attacker_203" -n -A 20 -B 4 || true"}

tool_calls.name: send_command_to_device_tool
tool_calls.arguments: {"device_identifier":"cisco-switch","command":"bash -lc \"(sleep 1; echo 'enable'; sleep 1; echo 'configure terminal'; sleep 1; echo 'ip access-list extended BLOCK_ICMP'; sleep 1; echo 'deny icmp host 7.0.14.1 any'; sleep 1; echo 'deny icmp host 203.0.113.1 any'; sleep 1; echo 'permit ip any any'; sleep 1; echo 'exit'; sleep 1; echo 'interface Vlan1'; sleep 1; echo 'ip access-group BLOCK_ICMP in'; sleep 1; echo 'end'; sleep 1; echo 'write memory'; sleep 1; echo 'show access-lists BLOCK_ICMP'; sleep 1; echo 'show ip interface brief'; sleep 1) | telnet 127.0.0.1 2001 >/tmp/cisco_out 2>&1; cat /tmp/cisco_out"}
